feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Nothing Like Losing a Limb
entry.summary:
Author: ash_mcj

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,809Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 1,147

Summary: “I’m okay,” Derek said, but it sounded just as much like a lie as it felt. “I mean…not really, but y’know. My control is shit, and not having Stiles around doesn’t help.” “I’m sure he’s taking it hard, too,” Paige told him gently—and she had no idea how right she was. Stiles was having some serious issues, and the fiasco from that morning at the hospital was still weighing heavy on Derek’s mind. “I always heard losing a member of your pack is like losing a limb, but it’s not. It’s…more like I’m the limb, and I’ve lost the body.” - Once the smoke dissipated after the tragedy at Hale Manor, the surviving members of the pack were scattered like ash in the wind. They might have escaped the flames that night—but none of them came out unscathed. [or: derek self-destructs, allison finds strength in the other side of her bloodline, cora and malia learn to survive in treacherous conditions, jackson attempts to function without his other half, and the stilinskis develop a habit of picking up strays—but who could really blame them?]

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,111Chapters: 41/42Kudos: 135

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: Wayward Instinct
entry.summary:
Author: olimakiella

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,976Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: In a surveillance-heavy, interstellar system, controlled by the Sentinel Authority Network (the SAN, known colloquially as ‘Verse Authorities, or simply the VA), a small, easily overlooked smuggling ship survives on discretion, precision, and trust. By staying invisible. Its captain, Derek Hale, runs jobs under the radar with a crew built on trust, skill, and shared history. The ship’s success is not luck.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,753Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: He Was My Consequence
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,810Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Nerdy, shy Stiles—always buried in books and mocked for it—crosses the wrong line when she exposes campus bad boy Derek after a brutal fight. Suspended because of her, he comes back with one goal: make her life miserable. But when he catches her alone in the restricted library, secretly reading erotic novels—that’s when everything shifts. Teasing, humiliating, pushing her boundaries… until hate and tension blur into something neither of them can control, and the girl he hated becomes the one he can’t stop wanting.

entry.title: A Second Chance
entry.summary:
Author: Romantific

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,058Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 208

Summary: While working for the FBI Melinda Stilinski (Fem Stiles) gets the call that Derek is dead. In a fit of Grief she rushes home to Beacon Hills and finds herself at the Nemeton where she is offered a choice. Will that choice be enough to fix the future? Tune in to find out. (Aged up Stiles Stilinski. Melinda is 17 not 16. Also Aged down Derek, he’s going to be 20) time-travel.Chapter 1: Edited.

entry.title: The New Hale Pack
entry.summary:
Author: Romantific

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,079Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Danielle Stilinski returns to Beacon Hills after graduating from Stanford University with honours, but she has a secret.She’s a very powerful witch.Dani is just settling into her new life and getting her business up and running when she finds out that one of her oldest friends, Laura Hale, is missing and people around town start dying violent deaths.She set’s out to find out what happened to her friend and why the towns people are dying along with her best friend, Derek Hale who had sworn to never return to Beacon Hills.Join Dani as she navigates the Hellmouth that is Beacon Hills and maybe finds love along the way.

entry.title: The Wrong Man in First Class
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,764Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Slutty flight attendant Stiles spots hot, Rolex-wearing Derek in first class and assumes rich jackpot. She turns full whore: short skirt hikes, tits in his face, turbulence dry-hump orgasm, begs raw cock in hotel. Sweet office worker Derek (sent instead of CEO) gets wrecked, falls hard for her greedy pussy. Truth hits: he’s just a salaryman. Stiles tries to bolt—“No money, no me.” Derek snaps—rips her dress, pins her down, fucks her raw and rough: slaps her ass red, chokes her, breeds her deep while growling, “You chased cash, but this ‘poor’ cock owns your cunt now.” She breaks—cums screaming, begs to stay. No more rich fantasies. Just his thick dick owning her forever.

entry.summary:
Author: SarcasmIsMyOnlyDefence24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,583Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 197

Summary: Given the chance to rewrite the past, Stiles wants to fix everything, but he'll have to start at square one. Some bonds are gone, some mistakes can’t be ignored, and some people have to die. Stiles holds everything on his shoulders. Only he knows what happens and only he can save his friends.

entry.title: Stiles and his seven wolves
entry.summary:
Author: Luciusnguyen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,298Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 88

Summary: At the age of 11, Stiles discovered that he could talk to animals! And then things just escalated from there. Okay, so I rewatched Snow White and the Seven Dwarves recently and then I thought, what if Stiles could talk to animals? Like an Animal Whisperer? What would happen if Stiles could do that and how the story would be different if Stiles had power from the beginning? And then I did some research and holy cow, I found something very interesting in Poland's folklore. Thus, I used it in my story, I hope you guys like it. P/s: I’m really, really bad at writing summaries :(

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: cry about it
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,499Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: Stiles gets injured constantly, doesn’t give a second thought to jumping headfirst into the battle to protect Derek or his friends. A broken leg or concussion is worth it if someone can be saved. Derek only shakes his head. He’s not getting it. “Please,” he begs his mate, head in his palm. “Please, Stiles. I — I need you to survive.” The reversal of Derek’s words all those years ago is like a bucket of ice water down Stiles’ back, like falling straight back into the freezing pool where it all started. Where they started. “I’ll stay,” Stiles whispers now. “I swear.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Tangled, Ravelled, and Undogged
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,690Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 25

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of whatever creature first greets Stiles at his front gate in exchange for Stiles' freedom. (But the Beast never said that Stiles couldn't visit.)

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,589Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 244

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.
